name: Mixed Vegetable Salad (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Corn kernels; fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a medium pot of water to a boil.
2. Add corn, green beans, and carrots. Cook for 3 minutes.
3. Drain the vegetables and plunge them into cold water.
4. Drain again and place in a large bowl.
5. Add remaining ingredients and toss to mix well.
6. Refrigerate for 1 hour to blend flavors.
7. Serves 6.
Author's Note: Store-bought non-fat salad dressing makes this salad as simple as can be. Crunchy vegetables make it tasty and low in fat.
